rawAssistant: Tomorrow's repairs won't help you much if the roads remain treacherous. Before you leave, ensure your lanterns are properly secured – that last gale did a great deal of damage. Check the wooden supports and any loose fittings; you wouldn't want to lose light in the midst of Hollowfen's growing darkness.
